Interface ICircuit

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to a circuit.

[Guid("E2674C0F-42FF-4071-B756-C2E8C48F8FF1")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ICircuit

Properties

Returns sections.

IArray CircuitSections { get; set; }

IArray

Returns the last time the circuit was exported.

object

object
